JUDGE WICK/B.FIELDS, REPORTER/E.MONTI, CLERK 10:00 AM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. JACQUELINE WOODS APPEARING FOR PLTF. DEFT NOT PRESENT. ALL ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IS PRESENTED. COURT AWARDS JUDGEMENT FOR PLTF. EXHIBITS ARE WITHDRAWN.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, MARIO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 473 ELLIS ST, #608, SF. $455.52 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $455.52, LEASE FORFEITED, COURT AWARDS COSTS PER COST BILL.
